d: Silven summons [[6]] flying blades. For the next [[8]]s, normal attacks will launch the summoned blades at enemies, with each blade dealing [[70%]]<ATK> damage.
Each blade deals [[75%]]<ATK> damage.
Each blade deals [[80%]]<ATK> damage.
Each blade deals [[85%]]<ATK> damage.
Each blade deals [[90%]]<ATK> damage.

When a flying blade sent by Silven's normal attacks hits an enemy, it leaves a Blademark. After performing [[4]] normal attacks, Silven's next normal attack turns into Gravity Collapse on the enemy with the most Blademarks. Gravity Collapse deals [[200%]]<ATK> damage, knocks the enemy down for [[2]]s, and detonates all Blademarks on that enemy to deal an extra [[36%]]<ATK> damage. 
If Aloft Edge is active, increases the range of Gravity Collapse by 1 tile, and launches extra flying blades, dealing [[48%]]<ATK> damage [[6]] times.
Increases the damage of Gravity Collapse to [[220%]]<ATK>. While Aloft Edge is active, increases damage per blade to [[52%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of Gravity Collapse to [[240%]]<ATK>. While Aloft Edge is active, increases damage per blade to [[56%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of Gravity Collapse to [[260%]]<ATK>. While Aloft Edge is active, increases damage per blade to [[60%]]<ATK>.

When a battle starts, Silven sets up a Tempered Field around himself, increasing his Ranged DEF by [[48]] while the field is active. Silven's flying blades sharpen when passing through the field, dealing extra true damage equal to [[1.3%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[14%]]<ATK>. The field disappears if Silven moves, and will reappear after he stands still for [[3]]s.
Increases extra true damage to [[1.4%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[16%]]<ATK>.
Increases extra true damage to [[1.5%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[18%]]<ATK>.
Increases extra true damage to [[1.6%]] of the target's max HP, up to [[20%]]<ATK>.
Increases ATK SPD by [[21]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[27]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[33]] during battle.

When Silven receives a temporary stat buff from an ally, he immediately recovers [[300]] Energy and permanently gains [[4]] Penetration. He also permanently increases the ATK SPD of both himself and that ally by [[16]]. This effect can only be triggered once per ally.
Increases the Penetration Silven gains to [[6]].
After the effect triggers [[2]] times, Silven gains an extra [[15%]] ATK.
Increases the Penetration Silven gains to [[8]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 18 ATK SPD, 10 DEF Penetration.

d: When up against powerful foes, Silven's knightly spirit kicks in, allowing him to deal [[25%]] more damage to enemies whose current HP ratio is higher than [[50%]].
